pi_items.source: Task description strictly instructs the creation of a folder named exactly 'Q4 Budget Review'.
Task description strictly instructs the search to look in the 'Inbox'.
Task description strictly instructs the search condition to contain the word 'budget'.
Task description strictly instructs the condition to check the 'Subject' field.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require creating a saved search folder named 'Q4 Budget Review', scoped to the 'Inbox', with the search condition that the 'Subject' field contains the word 'budget'. The environment setup script injects synthetic test emails specifically tailored to match these parameters.
